findings.description: Knowledge file adds a 'デフォルト値' column to the property table, but the source table has no such column. The source table columns are: 設定項目 / プロパティ名 / データ型 / 備考. Adding an empty column not present in the source is fabrication.
findings.source_evidence: Source table columns: 設定項目 | プロパティ名 | データ型 | 備考 (no default-value column)

findings.description: Knowledge file uses '**[正常終了]**' as a heading for the outbound processing block (step 3), but the source uses '**[往路処理]**' as the section heading there (anchored as `.. _outbound:`). The string '正常終了' appears only as the sub-title of step 3 ('**3. (正常終了)**'), not as a standalone section heading.

Section s2 content explicitly references the class names `HttpServletRequest` and `HttpServletResponse`, but neither appears in the hints. These are PascalCase class names that users may search for when asking how the handler receives HTTP objects.
findings.source_evidence: Source step 1: '``HttpServletRequest``/``HttpServletResponse`` をラップした HTTPリクエストオブジェクトおよび実行コンテキストを生成する。'
